evals.prompt: How do I find email addresses for prospects at a target company in Snov.io?
evals.expected_output: Guide to finding prospect emails using Snov.io's Email Finder tools including domain search, name-based lookup, and browser extension.

assertions.name: domain_search
assertions.description: Must explain the Domain Search feature for finding all email addresses associated with a company domain, including how to filter results by department or seniority

assertions.name: email_finder_methods
assertions.description: Must cover at least two methods for finding emails: domain search, single Email Finder (name + domain lookup), and the LinkedIn extension (Li Prospect Finder) for extracting emails from LinkedIn profiles

assertions.name: credit_costs
assertions.description: Must mention that Snov.io uses a credit-based system where email searches consume credits, and explain that different actions (domain search, single find, verification) have different credit costs

evals.prompt: How do I set up a multichannel email and LinkedIn campaign in Snov.io?
evals.expected_output: Step-by-step guide for creating a multichannel drip campaign in Snov.io combining email sequences with LinkedIn automation steps.

assertions.name: campaign_creation
assertions.description: Must explain how to create a multichannel drip campaign with email sequence steps including delays, triggers, and the drag-and-drop campaign builder for designing multi-step flows

assertions.name: linkedin_automation
assertions.description: Must describe the LinkedIn Automation add-on at $69/mo that enables LinkedIn actions (profile views, connection requests, messages) as campaign steps alongside email, and explain how to install and connect the LinkedIn extension

assertions.name: ab_testing
assertions.description: Must cover A/B testing capabilities for email variations within campaigns, including how to create multiple subject line or body variants and how Snov.io determines the winning version based on open or reply rates

evals.prompt: How do I use the Snov.io API to find and verify emails programmatically?
evals.expected_output: Technical guide to using the Snov.io REST API for automated email finding and verification, covering authentication, key endpoints, and the async verification pattern.

assertions.name: oauth_auth
assertions.description: Must explain the OAuth 2.0 authentication flow for the Snov.io API, including obtaining a client_id and client_secret from account settings and exchanging them for an access token via the /v1/oauth/access_token endpoint

assertions.name: search_endpoints
assertions.description: Must describe the Domain Search endpoint (/v2/domain-emails-with-info) for retrieving emails by domain and the Email Finder endpoint (/v1/get-emails-from-names) for finding emails by name + domain, including required parameters and the 60 requests/min rate limit

assertions.name: async_verification
assertions.description: Must explain the two-step async email verification pattern: first submitting an email via the Add Email for Verification endpoint which returns a task_hash, then polling the Email Verification Status endpoint with that task_hash to retrieve results once processing completes
